expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: Game tile titles are being truncated and cut off in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections. Examples include 'MAGNI...' (should be full game name), 'Hyperc...' (partially visible), and 'Dark...' (partially visible). This prevents users from reading complete game names.
The 'Hot Game' navigation item in the top menu bar is truncated and displays as 'Hot Gam'.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a misspelling of 'Jackpots' as 'Jacpots'; all reported issues concern text truncation/cutting off, not spelling errors.
